label: Gather Preferences
description: Collect travel requirements from the user (destination, dates, budget, group info, interests, etc.)

label: Shortlist Destinations
description: Research and shortlist 8-10 destinations matching the user's preferences

label: Select Destinations
description: Present the shortlisted destinations and let the user choose which ones to explore

label: Research Experiences
description: Find activities and experiences at the selected destinations that match preferences

label: Plan Itinerary
description: Build a day-by-day itinerary slotting places and activities

label: Research Accommodation & Flights
description: Research places to stay and flight options for the trip

label: Final Plan
description: Present the complete, detailed travel plan with all details
